subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is a noble branch and a delicate bough, planted within the garden of Thy mercy, nurtured and fostered through [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا فرع رفیع و قضیب لطیف قد غرس فی حدیقه رحمانیتک و نشا و نما فی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
